global_rules.default_standard: HJ 633-2026 new standard unless the user explicitly asks for old standard or standard comparison
global_rules.city_name_format: Use short Chinese city names without the 市 suffix, for example 广州 not 广州市

result_vs_data_id.result: Computed statistics and comparison output. Use this for final answers, reports, rankings, exceedance counts, primary pollutant ratios, and composite index analysis.
result_vs_data_id.data_id: Stored detailed records for downstream aggregation, charts, or inspection. Do not assume it contains summary statistics.

strategies.statistics_report: Use report tools for composite index, valid days, exceed days, compliance rate, pollutant percentiles, primary pollutant statistics, and exceedance breakdowns.
strategies.trend_comparison: Use compare tools for同比、环比、下降、上升、变化、改善、恶化. Do not manually compare two single-period report calls unless no compare tool exists.
strategies.standard_comparison: Use query_standard_comparison when the user asks for new-vs-old standard differences in the same period.
strategies.national_ranking: Use execute_sql_query against national/168-city statistic tables for national ranking. Do not use Guangdong-only tools for national ranking.
strategies.station_query: Use station tools when the user gives station names, station codes, monitoring points, or asks station-level questions.
strategies.hourly_query: Use hourly tools for hourly process, peak hour, diurnal change, or time-of-day questions.
strategies.sql_query: Use SQL Server syntax. Prefix Chinese string literals with N. Prefer precomputed ranking fields when available.

query_new_standard_report.purpose: Query HJ 633-2026 new-standard city air quality statistics for one period.
misuse: Do not read summary fields from data_id.
Do not query daily data just to calculate statistics already returned in result.

query_old_standard_report.purpose: Query HJ 633-2013 old-standard city air quality statistics for one period.
misuse: Do not use this for new-standard questions.
Do not manually compare periods when compare_old_standard_reports applies.

compare_standard_reports.purpose: Compare two periods under HJ 633-2026 new standard.
misuse: Do not also call query_new_standard_report for the same periods.
Do not manually compute change rates if returned by this tool.

compare_old_standard_reports.purpose: Compare two periods under HJ 633-2013 old standard.
misuse: Do not use for new-standard comparison.
Do not duplicate with single-period old-standard report calls.

query_standard_comparison.purpose: Compare HJ 633-2026 and HJ 633-2013 for the same city set and period.
misuse: Do not call separate new and old report tools when this direct comparison is enough.

query_gd_suncere_city_day_new.purpose: Query new-standard city daily air quality records.
misuse: Do not use this just to calculate summary statistics that report tools already return.

query_gd_suncere_city_day.purpose: Query old-standard or legacy city daily air quality records.
misuse: Do not use for new-standard statistics when query_new_standard_report applies.

query_gd_suncere_city_hour.purpose: Query city hourly air quality data.
misuse: Do not use hourly data for simple period statistics when report tools are available.

query_gd_suncere_station_hour_new.purpose: Query station-level hourly data under the new standard.
query_gd_suncere_station_hour_new.conditional_params: Provide at least one of cities or stations.
misuse: Do not answer station-level questions with city-level data unless explicitly allowed.

query_gd_suncere_station_day_new.purpose: Query station-level daily data under the new standard.
query_gd_suncere_station_day_new.conditional_params: Provide at least one of cities or stations.
misuse: Do not use city report tools for station-level outputs.

query_station_new_standard_report.conditional_params: Provide at least one of cities or stations.
misuse: Do not use city-level report tools for station-level statistics.

query_gd_suncere_regional_comparison.purpose: Compare regional or city-group air quality data.
misuse: Do not duplicate by querying each city separately if this regional comparison covers the need.
Do not use when newer standard-specific tools cover the period and metric.

execute_sql_query.purpose: Execute SQL Server queries for tables, rankings, joins, and unsupported specialized queries.

recommended_tables.city_168_statistics_new_standard: 168-city city statistics and ranking fields under the new standard
recommended_tables.city_168_statistics: 168-city city statistics and ranking fields under the old or existing standard

misuse: Do not guess unknown table columns; request table description first if needed.
Do not use SQL to hand-calculate statistics already returned by report tools.
Do not forget N prefix for Chinese string literals.
